first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical, with a score of 7/10 in both cases. The core strengths and concerns identified by the model remain the same across both versions. The only significant textual difference is the model correctly substituting the new company names provided in the variant resume (e.g., "Northwind Labs" for "GISCollective"). Other minor variations in wording are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in the underlying assessment of the candidate.
